name: Apple Pie LF
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Crushed pineapple (unsweetened, packed in its own juice, undrained)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine apple slices and all ingredients except butter.
2. Mix together until well combined.
3. Pour into an unbaked bottom crust.
4. Dot with butter.
5. Top with a vented or lattice crust.
6. Bake at 425 degrees F for 15 minutes.
7. Reduce heat to 350 degrees F and continue baking for 25 to 35 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
The pineapple used has no sugar added. It is typically sold in cans that resemble tuna cans, weighing about 7 or 8 ounces.
